summary: Comprehensive testing of stacked/nested modals feature completed. All features working correctly: clicking stones in Job dialog opens Stone dialog on top, clicking jobs in Shipment dialog opens Job dialog on top, 3-level stacking (Shipment->Job->Stone) works, all Stone dialog fields present and functional.

issues: Minor React warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - cosmetic only, no impact on functionality

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (Job #17 with 3 stones: 2 grouped in Cert 1, 1 ungrouped)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stacked modal feature fully working. Job #17 has 3 stones for testing: EM11100J1703 (ungrouped Emerald), PA1100J1701 and PA1100J1702 (grouped in Certificate 1 as Pair). Shipment #3 has 3 jobs including Job #17.

test_flows_completed.feature: Jobs page - Click ungrouped stone row
test_flows_completed.details: Stone dialog opens on top of Job dialog showing stone info, verbal findings textarea, certificate scan upload

test_flows_completed.feature: Jobs page - Click grouped stone row
test_flows_completed.details: Stone dialog opens showing Certificate Group badge, group warning message about scan applying to all stones in group

test_flows_completed.feature: Shipments page - Shipment dialog to Job dialog
test_flows_completed.details: Clicking job row in shipment opens Job dialog stacked on top of Shipment dialog
Stone dialog opens correctly as third level, all fields and buttons functional

test_flows_completed.feature: Stone dialog - Type, Weight, Shape display
test_flows_completed.details: All stone properties correctly displayed in info grid

test_flows_completed.feature: Stone dialog - Value and Fee display
test_flows_completed.details: Value and Fee correctly displayed with formatting
Shows 'Group X' for grouped stones, '-' for ungrouped stones
Textarea present with data-testid='stone-verbal-findings-input', accepts text input, Save button enables when modified

test_flows_completed.feature: Stone dialog - Certificate Scan Upload button
test_flows_completed.details: Upload Scan button present and clickable

test_flows_completed.feature: Stone dialog - Group warning for grouped stones
test_flows_completed.details: Warning message 'This stone is part of Certificate Group X. Uploading a scan will apply to all stones in this group.' displays for grouped stones
